message:
feat: add write operations — create nodes, annotate, add links

Three new MCP tools: kg_create_node (writes .md file + indexes),
kg_annotate_node (appends to existing file + re-indexes),
kg_add_link (adds wiki link + creates edge). All write to the
vault filesystem so changes sync bidirectionally with Obsidian.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
